title: Family Routes longitudinal study
body: "Family Routes is a longitudinal study intended to track the needs, experiences and outcomes of children leaving care on an adoption order (AO) or special guardianship order (SGO) in England.  This series of reports draws on:   in-depth interviews with 74 families:  40 adoptive families 34 special guardianship families   data analysis of Department for Education administrative datasets   "

taxons.title: Safeguarding and social care for children
